message:
feat(daemon): add optional TCP listener for remote gRPC

When GRPCAddr is configured (e.g., ":65433"), the daemon now listens
on a TCP socket in addition to the Unix socket. The same gRPC server
handles both listeners. The TCP listener is properly cleaned up on
daemon shutdown.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
